title: Sr. SW Engineer (3 - 5 years of exp. in ServiceNow, Python, C#, Javascript, AI)
company_focus: Global payments technology and transaction processing
description:
Company Description

Visa is a world leader in payments technology, facilitating
transactions between consumers, merchants, financial
institutions and government entities across more than 200
countries and territories, dedicated to uplifting everyone,
everywhere by being the best way to pay and be paid.

At Visa, you'll have the opportunity to create impact at
scale — tackling meaningful challenges, growing your skills
and seeing your contributions impact lives around the world.
Join Visa and do work that matters — to you, to your
community, and to the world.

Progress starts with you.

Job Description

Visa’s Technology Organization is a community of problem
solvers and innovators reshaping the future of commerce. We
operate the world’s most sophisticated processing networks
capable of handling more than 65k secure transactions a
second across 80M merchants, 15k Financial Institutions, and
billions of everyday people. While working with us you’ll
get to work on complex distributed systems and solve massive
scale problems centered on new payment flows, business and
data solutions, cyber security, and B2C platforms.

The Opportunity:

We are seeking a Senior Software Engineer / ServiceNow
Senior Developer with 6+ years of hands-on experience in
Python, C#, and Full Stack Development, with secondary
expertise in ServiceNow platform development.

This hybrid role blends core software engineering excellence
with ServiceNow platform development and integration,
supporting Visa’s SaaS-driven, enterprise-scale technology
landscape. The ideal candidate is a versatile technologist
who enjoys working across multiple platforms, adapting to
new tools and frameworks, and contributing to high-
performance, secure, and scalable solutions in and around
the ServiceNow ecosystem.

Essential Functions:

- Design, develop, and maintain enterprise-grade SaaS
  applications using Python, C#, JavaScript, and modern full
  stack technologies
- Lead and contribute to full lifecycle development including
  design, implementation, testing, and support
- Develop, customize, and enhance ServiceNow applications,
  workflows, and platform capabilities across ITSM, ITOM,
  HRSD, CSM, SecOps, GRC, and custom applications.
- Translate business and technical requirements into scalable,
  secure, and high-performing solutions, collaborating with
  product owners, architects, and business stakeholders
- Build and maintain integrations between ServiceNow and
  external systems using REST/SOAP APIs, MID Servers, and
  supporting technologies
- Apply strong software engineering principles to ServiceNow
  development, ensuring upgrade-safe, maintainable, and
  performant solutions
- Perform code reviews, design reviews, and technical
  mentoring to ensure quality and adherence to platform and
  enterprise standards
- Troubleshoot complex system issues, conduct root cause
  analysis, and implement sustainable fixes
- Ensure security, compliance, and governance by following
  platform best practices related to roles, ACLs, data
  access, and regulatory requirements
- Create and maintain technical documentation, including
  architecture diagrams, interface specifications, and
  configuration guides
- Stay current with ServiceNow releases, SaaS platform
  innovations, and modern development practices, proactively
  recommending improvements
- Participate in Agile/Scrum ceremonies, project planning, and
  cross-functional collaboration
- Demonstrate flexibility and willingness to learn and work on
  technologies beyond ServiceNow as business needs evolve

This is a hybrid position. Hybrid employees can alternate
time between both remote and office. Employees in hybrid
roles are expected to work from the office 2-3 set days a
week (determined by leadership/site), with a general
guidepost of being in the office 50% or more of the time
based on business needs.

Qualifications

The Skills You Bring:

Core Technical Skills (Primary)

- 3+ years of professional software development experience
- Strong proficiency in: Python, C# / .NET, JavaScript and
  Full Stack Development (frontend frameworks, backend
  services, APIs)
- Experience designing and building cloud-native, SaaS-based
  platforms
- Solid understanding of RESTful APIs, microservices, and
  distributed systems
- Strong database experience (SQL and/or NoSQL)
- ServiceNow Skills (Secondary)
- Hands-on experience with ServiceNow development and
  configuration

Proficiency with:

- Business Rules, Script Includes, Client Scripts
- UI Policies, Flow Designer, Workflows
- Integrations and MID Server configuration
- Familiarity with ServiceNow platform architecture,
  performance, and security best practices
- ServiceNow certifications (CSA, CIS in ITSM/ITOM/HRSD); CAD
  or CTA is a strong plus
- Experience integrating ServiceNow with enterprise systems
  (e.g., SAP, Workday, Oracle, custom APIs)
- Exposure to cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP)
- DevOps and CI/CD experience (Docker, pipelines, automation)
- Experience working in Agile/Scrum environments
- Strong communication skills with the ability to engage both
  technical and non-technical stakeholders



**We do not expect that any single candidate would fulfill
all of these characteristics. For instance, we have exciting
team members who are really focused on building scalable
systems but didn’t work with payments technology or web
applications before joining Visa.

Additional Information

Visa is an EEO Employer. Qualified applicants will receive
consideration for employment without regard to race, color,
religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, gender
identity, disability or protected veteran status. Visa will
also consider for employment qualified applicants with
criminal histories in a manner consistent with EEOC
guidelines and applicable local law.
responsibilities: Design, develop, and maintain enterprise-grade SaaS applications using Python, C#, JavaScript, and modern full stack technologies
Develop, customize, and enhance ServiceNow applications, workflows, and platform capabilities across ITSM, ITOM, HRSD, CSM, SecOps, GRC, and custom applications

Translate business and technical requirements into scalable, secure, and high-performing solutions
Perform code reviews, design reviews, and technical mentoring to ensure quality and adherence to platform and enterprise standards

ai_classification_reasoning:
The job title mentions "AI" as a skill but the job
description contains no AI-specific responsibilities, tools,
frameworks, or use cases. The role is focused on ServiceNow
platform development, full-stack engineering, and enterprise
SaaS applications. AI appears to be listed as a nice-to-have
skill without any actual AI work involved.
